S-01.notes: Two-column compact form per D3+2 density and D1+1 speed; submit-on-Enter wired on primary CTA; keyboard shortcuts panel surfaced. Property closed set is the same as CAREFUL-DEFAULT (F-05's three enumerated query parameters); the speed/density differences are in the form layout and chrome, not in the field set — the requirements give only three uploadable parameters and the variant honours that.

S-02.notes: Dense 4-column receipt grid mirroring §7 FileLog visible fields. Hidden fields (BulkErrorFile path, IsActive) are not surfaced. The prior version's invented Reference/Submitter/Period/Source/Currency/Priority/Net-total/Cost-centre fields and the prior line-item Transaction sample table were removed as fabrications — those properties are not in §7 FileLog and §7 Transaction is not a source for this screen.

S-03.notes: Per-row column names (Row/Column/Rule/Message/OffendingValue/Severity) are inferred from F-18's prose 'JSON array of per-row error objects' and flagged [OPAQUE-PAYLOAD] in the blueprint. The prior version's invented Suggested-fix / Inline-fix / Action / Reference columns and the filter chips referencing fabricated rules (Date format, Amount > threshold, etc.) were removed — those properties don't exist in the requirements.
